REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-22-2006 - CASE SETTLED. (218)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANK, LYNNE R TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRY, LARRY PALMER, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 786 GEARY STREET, # 204, SAN FRANCISCO,CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-13-2006, LEASE FORFEITED, THE WRIT SHALL BE ISSUED FORTHWITH, BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL JUNE 13, 2006 AT 6:PM. SO LONG AS DEFENDANT VACATES AND SURRENDERS POSSESSION AS PROVIDED IN PARAGRPAH # 3 OF THE JUDGMENT, SHE (KIMBERLY PALMER) IS ENTITLED TO PREPARE A STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PROPERTY IS TAKEN AGAINST DEFENDANT LARRY FRY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
